content.en:
The crystal barrier is a barrier on the side of the 4,000th Territory and the 3,000th Territory, and this barrier is extremely thick, which is simply beyond the imagination of the Fifth Realm.

Even if it is the super-dimensional realm of the sixth realm, it is impossible to break the crystal barrier, and it can only pass through the eleventh dimension in a special way, and find the weak point of the crystal barrier from the eleventh dimension, so that it can take a long time to break the crystal barrier, and then you can leave the territory of the four thousand, and thus enter the territory of more than three thousand.

And the more than 3,000 territories call themselves the upper regions, and the entire territory of the 4,000 territories is called the lower regions.

The crystal barrier is so strong, but there is a crystal barrier space, but such a crystal barrier space is very rare, it is difficult to find, and even if some crystal barrier space exists, it is deep in the crystal barrier, and the root goes in.

There are only a very small number of crystal barrier spaces in "640" that are just close to the 4000 territory, and they can be broken in a certain period of time, but after entering, once the crystal barrier is restored, if you want to go out again, you will need to wait for a long time.

Obviously, the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace has found a crystal barrier space that can be entered, and now it has entered it directly, which is used to avoid the multi-dimensional tribulation of death.

Is this possible?

It's really doable!

However, this move really angered other forces, but they didn't dare to really slaughter the remaining extra-dimensional realms of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace, in case there were still extra-dimensional realms to survive, when the death multi-dimensional tribulation passed, after the fifth realm of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace came out, they would definitely retaliate.

Moreover, if they don't kill, those extra-dimensional realms in the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace are almost impossible to survive the multi-dimensional tribulation of death without the support of the powerhouses of the fifth realm.

......

"The crystal barrier space should not be able to accommodate too many extra-dimensional realms, if you go in too much, there will definitely be some problems, otherwise those fifth realms of the ten-dimensional heavenly palace will not give up so many extra-dimensional realms, and even the descendants of the fifth realm have also been abandoned!"

Ye Tian didn't have much interest in this kind of crystal barrier space, and it didn't make sense to just stuff a few strong people into it.

Of course, if there was really such a crystal barrier space given to him for free, he would also accept it.

In the days that followed, there were often things where the Fifth Realm disappeared, and these Fifth Realms may have found a way to avoid the Death Multidimensional Tribulation, but they may not be reliable, and some can even only avoid the Death Multidimensional Tribulation by themselves, and directly abandon all their families and forces.

There are also overlord-level extra-dimensional forces that can't avoid the death multi-dimensional catastrophe, and directly build countless formations, and use countless formations to protect the force headquarters, although it is certainly not of much use, but it is good to be able to protect some extra-dimensional realms and avoid greater losses in the early stage.

In a flash, the 50 million extradimensional era passed.

The precursor of the multi-dimensional tribulation is getting stronger and stronger, and countless creatures have fallen under this precursor, and I don't know how many extradimensional realms have been broken into pieces.

A large number of Fourth Realms have fallen, and there is nothing to do with those top-level Fourth Realms.

With the birth of the multi-dimensional tribulation, many resource treasures and even treasure lands were born in many territories.

Opportunities and crises coexist, and the multi-dimensional tribulation is very dangerous, but it is also an opportunity for many third and even fourth realms to break through!

Ye Tian had asked many human powerhouses to go out to find opportunities, and they only needed to come back before the multidimensional tribulation arrived.

"It's still a little short of comprehending the rules of the sixfold dimension, but the cultivation has already broken through to the middle of the fifth realm, and those innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies have all cultivated to the limit of the fourth layer of Dacheng, and they can't break through to the fifth layer for the time being. The soul will has also improved a lot, and it is getting closer and closer to the multi-dimensional tribulation, and it seems that it is much easier to improve the soul will. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He felt that if his soul will wanted to break through to the eleventh dimension, he had to put his hope in the multidimensional tribulation of death.

The Death Multidimensional Tribulation is indeed extremely dangerous, and the Fifth Realm is easy to fall, but the opportunity is also the greatest.

For example, during the multidimensional tribulation of death, the barriers between the various dimensions weakened, and he could even enter the eleventh dimension.

It's just that there are more multi-dimensional beings in the sixth realm of the eleventh dimension, and it is easy to encounter the multi-dimensional lives of the sixth realm, but he is not afraid of falling and copying his body, if he can find a treasure similar to the multi-dimensional silver fir in the eleventh dimension, wouldn't he be able to raise the soul will to the eleventh dimension?

Another 10 million extradimensional years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian comprehended the rules of the sixfold dimension, his strength skyrocketed, and he fused the sixth innate multi-dimensional Dao Body, the Ten Winged Dao Body, and his physical fitness skyrocketed again......

Then, he cultivated the seventh innate multi-dimensional Dao body, the ten-dimensional vine body, which was an innate multi-dimensional Dao body that could quickly recover from injuries and almost make the body immortal, and there was also a fifth layer.

After that, he spent some years and countless resources to cultivate the ten-dimensional vine body to the fourth layer of the Dacheng Limit Realm.

After some more years, he created a defensive tenth-dimensional will mastery - ten-dimensional pagoda technique!

Immediately afterward, another 100 million extradimensional epochs passed.

At this time, he once again created a Five Realms Supreme Peerless Technique, the Ten Dimensional Void Technique, which was a speed-based Five Realms Supreme Peerless Technique, which was enough to evade the tracking of ordinary Sixth Realm powerhouses, and it was also of great help in battle.

"It's a pity that the cultivation time is too short, I'm afraid I won't be able to comprehend the rules of the sevenfold dimension before the death multi-dimensional tribulation arrives!" Ye Tian said helplessly.

There are still 40 million extradimensional epochs to go, and the multidimensional catastrophe of death is coming.

And at this moment, it is already a real multi-dimensional tribulation, and many multi-dimensional battlefields have appeared.

In addition, the prelude to the multi-dimensional tribulation of death is also coming, and in some places, there are even multi-dimensional tribulation creatures of the fifth realm that have been bred.

And in the place where the multi-dimensional tribulation creatures are brought, there will inevitably be treasures that are extremely valuable in the 2.2 realm, which have a huge attraction to the fifth realm.

At this time, as long as the Fifth Realm provokes temptation, it is still safe, and those Fifth Realms will not come out yet.

But if you covet treasures and fight with these fifth-realm multi-dimensional tribulation creatures, you are at risk of falling.

To take a risk, or not to take a risk?

If you don't take risks, it's still very likely to fall in the later stage, and if you take risks, you may get a big opportunity, so that your strength will skyrocket, and you may survive the multi-dimensional catastrophe of death.

......

this day.

A copy of Ye Tian's body was ready to hunt down those multi-dimensional catastrophe creatures of the Fifth Realm, so as to obtain more chance treasures.

Soon, he locked on to a thunder cicada of the fifth realm.
